title: VPI: does not return reg name starting with an underscore
body:
We have a test module with a single-bit reg starting with an underscore (``reg _underscore_name;``):
https://github.com/cocotb/cocotb/blob/50c9cb6d3ce8c6d21eb29067e31b0775427a0301/tests/designs/sample_module/sample_module.sv#L138
However, Icarus 10.3 does not return this reg via VPI.

See also https://github.com/cocotb/cocotb/pull/1634.

The following is the output that ``VPI_TRACE`` gives for that module:

  <summary>VPI_TRACE output</summary>
